per_outcome.operationalization: count of annual earnings forecasts issued by the analyst for the firm in the year
negative average absolute forecast error (|forecasted EPS - actual EPS|) scaled by stock price at fiscal year start
average difference between forecasted EPS and actual EPS, scaled by absolute value of actual EPS
binary indicator: first forecast exceeds actual EPS and last forecast is at or below actual EPS
count of all firms covered by analysts in the investment bank in the year
binary indicator for above-median forecast dispersion across all analysts; measures information environment uncertainty, not output quality or speed
binary indicator for above-median firm return volatility; measures market conditions, not analyst output quality or speed
binary indicator for above-median average daily bid-ask spread; measures market liquidity, not analyst output quality or speed
binary indicator for absence of management earnings guidance; measures firm disclosure policy, not analyst output quality or speed
binary indicator for below-median forecast accuracy over past three years; measures analyst characteristics, not current task output
